rationale: The reserved corporate name being transferred. Reuses NP_MNPCA-1's name_reservation.name_to_reserve key — semantically the same name, just at a later moment in its 120-day reservation lifecycle. Same convention as CORP_MBCA-1A.

The original applicant who reserved the name (the transferor). Reuses NP_MNPCA-1's name_reservation.applicant.name — same conceptual identity, on the transfer form rather than the original reservation form. Same convention as CORP_MBCA-1A.

Name of the person/entity receiving the reservation. Lives in the name_reservation.* namespace (parallel to name_reservation.applicant.name) per CORP_MBCA-1A precedent — keeps the entire reservation lifecycle clustered together rather than spinning up a top-level transfer.* namespace.
Single-line transferee address (form does not split components). Parallel shape to NP_MNPCA-1's name_reservation.applicant.address.
Date the transferor signed the document.

label_verbatim: ORIGINAL APPLICANT (Transferor) / (signature of any duly authorized person) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined printed-name-and-capacity widget for the transferor (or duly authorized person signing on the transferor's behalf). Reuses NP_MNPCA-1's name_reservation.applicant.printed_name_and_capacity rather than filing.signer.printed_name_and_capacity — there is no separately formed entity yet, so there is no 'filing entity' to attach a generic filing.signer.* to. The (signature of any duly authorized person) line above this widget is wet-ink only — no AcroForm widget.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1 (cover-letter primitive). Typically populated with the reserved name being transferred.

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2. Field-id has typo 'entitys' (no apostrophe) preserved upstream.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite enum value 'hold_for_pickup'.
Expedite enum value '24h_next_business_day'.
Expedite enum value 'immediate_same_day'.
Total fees ($5 base per page-0 'Filing Fee $5.00' plus expedite premium).
Contact name.
Contact phone.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
rationale: Filing-specific contact email.

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
rationale: Annual-report reminder email — like NP_MNPCA-1 / CORP_MBCA-1A, this field is meaningless on a name-reservation transfer (no entity is created), but the cover-letter primitive includes it. Typically left blank.
Recipient name.
Recipient firm.
Recipient street.
Recipient city/state/zip combined. Field-id has double-space ('City State  Zip') preserved upstream.
